title: Pan-Seared Nigiri with Garlic Butter
description: A French-inspired twist on traditional nigiri, featuring a crispy pan-seared crust and a rich garlic butter sauce.
instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the raw butter and let it melt.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the nigiri and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the nigiri to a plate and set aside.
Add the peruvian white wine vinegar to the pan and reduce by half.
Stir in the raw butter until melted and smooth.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the pan-seared nigiri with garlic butter sauce.
